visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman with a hairclip eating a yellow sandwich. She is wearing a green top under white overalls. The background is a brightly lit indoor food court with red plastic stools and metal counters. (2) A wide shot shows the 'ICC PUDU' sign inside a bustling market with many people walking around. The lighting is bright and industrial. (3) The woman stands in front of a metal gate, speaking directly to the camera with an expressive face and hand gestures. (4) The scene shifts to a food stall numbered 'G-79' with a red neon sign. The woman is seen tasting a spoonful of steaming soup and then eating noodles from a bowl with chopsticks. (5) An elderly man in a white apron appears behind her, posing enthusiastically for the camera. They share a playful interaction. (6) The woman visits stall 'G-85', showing a sign for 'Ah Weng Koh Hainan Tea'. She eats toast and dips it into a bowl of soft-boiled eggs. (7) At stall 'G-62', she tastes a bowl of noodles with seafood. She uses chopsticks to lift the noodles and takes a large bite, followed by a close-up of her facial reaction. (8) She visits stall '177C' for 'IMBI Fried Gold Cake'. A close-up shows the fried cake being pulled apart, revealing a gooey, stretchy purple and orange filling. (9) Finally, at 'Lintang 138 Coffee', she is seen drinking an iced coffee through a straw while sitting at a table, gesturing with her hand to describe the taste.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 很好吃欸. [Variety]: 😍. (2) [Subtitle]: 烤的超級酥脆. (3) [Subtitle]: 我要再三份這個. (4) [Logo]: ICC PUDU. (5) [Subtitle]: 這邊是ICC早市. (6) [Subtitle]: 今天要去吃吃看. (7) [Subtitle]: 吉隆坡的早市 究竟味道是怎樣的. (8) [Logo]: G-79 坤叔牛白腩. (9) [Subtitle]: 它是以牛腩麵非常有名的. (10) [Subtitle]: 藥材味. (11) [Subtitle]: 蔬果的甜香合在一起. (12) [Subtitle]: 我蠻喜歡它的湯頭的!!. (13) [Subtitle]: 跟它的蘿蔔. (14) [Subtitle]: 點大碗的它才有附牛筋. (15) [Subtitle]: 不過它的牛筋是偏脆口. (16) [Variety]: 超E老闆突襲. (17) [Variety]: 老闆很可愛🤣. (18) [Subtitle]: 下一間呢 來去吃. (19) [Logo]: G-85 阿榮哥海南茶. (20) [Subtitle]: 阿榮叔. (21) [Subtitle]: 咖椰吐司加半熟蛋. (22) [Subtitle]: 咖椰的味道蠻濃的. (23) [Subtitle]: 配上奶油味道剛剛好. (24) [Subtitle]: 這個可以沾著半熟蛋. (25) [Variety]: 天壽好吃. (26) [Variety]: 好!!. (27) [Logo]: G-62 特色潮州蒸大板. (28) [Subtitle]: 這間呢是. (29) [Subtitle]: 特色潮州蒸大板. (30) [Subtitle]: 它是北馬的特色食物之一. (31) [Subtitle]: 我喜歡它的湯口. (32) [Subtitle]: 有點酸酸辣辣跟甜甜的 非常地開胃. (33) [Subtitle]: 但它的魚是 有土味的那一種魚. (34) [Subtitle]: 比較在意魚的土味的話 你可能稍微思考一下. (35) [Subtitle]: 吃完我們的蒸大板之後 尋找我們的炸年糕. (36) [Logo]: 177C IMBI炸年糕. (37) [Subtitle]: 它跟台灣的炸年糕很像欸. (38) [Subtitle]: 味道幾乎一模一樣. (39) [Subtitle]: 因為我現在是熱的嘛. (40) [Variety]: 牽絲太犯規了. (41) [Subtitle]: 它比較滑比較軟. (42) [Subtitle]: 所以有點像融化的那種cheese的那種. (43) [Subtitle]: 然後上下就是有芋頭. (44) [Subtitle]: 台灣的那種古早味的感覺. (45) [Subtitle]: 真的是蠻多特殊的東西. (46) [Subtitle]: 我覺得咖椰我很喜歡. (47) [Subtitle]: 炸年糕可以試試看. (48) [Logo]: Lintang 138 Coffee 連登138. (49) [Subtitle]: 最後呢我們點了這個連登138. (50) [Subtitle]: 帶一點點 暗暗的那種苦澀感. (51) [Subtitle]: 我覺得是蠻舒服的苦感. (52) [Subtitle]: 味道上還OK.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 elderly male stall owner, and at least 10 different customers or vendors visible in background shots of the market.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a green ribbed tank top underneath white overalls, accessorized with hair clips and multiple rings.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bustling indoor market/food court (ICC Pudu) featuring various metal food stalls with Chinese and English signage, red plastic furniture, tiled floors, and industrial ceilings with fans and pipes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic female voice expressing delight: 'Heng hao chi e'. An upbeat, acoustic guitar-driven BGM plays steadily. (2) A crisp crunching sound (SFX) is heard as she bites into toast, followed by a whoosh transition. (3) The female narrator describes the ICC market with high vocal arousal and a fast speech rate. Ambient chatter of a busy market is audible in the background. (4) A slurping sound and percussive bowl clicks (SFX) occur as she describes beef noodles. (5) Sound of laughter and a brief interaction with an elderly male voice occurs, characterized by a friendly and jovial tone. (6) Another crunching sound as she bites into Kaya toast, paired with a 'pop' sound effect for visual emphasis. (7) Continuous fast-paced narration with rising intonation as she tries seafood noodles and fried cake. (8) Slurping and chewing sounds are layered with the music and voice tracking. (9) The audio concludes with a final summary delivered in a satisfied tone, with the sound of a straw gurgling in an iced drink.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Introduction -> Sequential Sampling of Stalls -> Closing Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a highly engaging, fast-paced review of multiple breakfast food stalls at ICC Pudu, a famous market in Kuala Lumpur. The video aims to recommend specific dishes (beef noodles, Kaya toast, steamed large boards, fried cakes) based on the creator's personal taste experience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While multiple stalls are featured, the tone is that of an organic travel vlog/food review rather than a paid advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical 'douyin/tiktok' style editing with high-density text overlays, fast cuts, and emphasized eating SFX to maintain viewer engagement. The location is verified as ICC Pudu in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, based on the on-screen text and regional food specialties mentioned.
